concept: Authentic Tanzanian food: catering, meal prep, packaged foods, and cultural experiences.

cottage_food_not_allowed: Anything requiring refrigeration or temperature control
label_requirements: Statement: "Made in a home kitchen not inspected by the Georgia Department of Agriculture"

commercial_kitchen_requirement.description: All hot meals and potentially hazardous foods must be prepared in a licensed commercial kitchen.
allowed_sales_from_home_if_prepared_in_k: Hot Tanzanian plates (pilau, biriyani, mishkaki, chapati, beans, stews)

requirements: Collect and remit sales tax where required
Keep records of expenses and revenue

rules: Home-based business allowed but cannot operate like a full restaurant from the house.

commercial_kitchen_plan.goal: Rent a licensed commercial kitchen in Atlanta to legally cook hot Tanzanian meals.

options.name: Atlanta Shared Kitchen
options.location: 6899 Peachtree Industrial Blvd D, Peachtree Corners, GA 30092

options.name: Leaven Kitchen
options.notes: Good for small catering and meal prep.

revenue_streams.name: Catering
revenue_streams.description: Full-service Tanzanian catering for events.
revenue_streams.notes: High-margin, booked in advance, predictable income.

revenue_streams.name: Meal Prep Subscription Service
revenue_streams.description: Weekly Tanzanian meal prep delivered or picked up.
revenue_streams.notes: Recurring revenue, ideal for busy professionals and families.

revenue_streams.name: Corporate Lunch Contracts
revenue_streams.description: Regular lunch catering for offices and work sites.
revenue_streams.notes: High-volume, recurring contracts possible.

revenue_streams.name: Event Vendor Booths
revenue_streams.description: Food booth at festivals, markets, and events.
revenue_streams.notes: Great for brand exposure and cash flow.

revenue_streams.name: Private Chef Services
revenue_streams.description: In-home or on-location private chef experiences.
menu_examples: Full Tanzanian dinner: pilau, biriyani, mishkaki, chapati, beans, dessert
revenue_streams.notes: High-end, high-margin, low volume.

revenue_streams.name: Cooking Classes
revenue_streams.description: Teach Tanzanian cooking in-person or online.
revenue_streams.notes: Build brand, content, and extra income.

revenue_streams.name: Packaged Cottage Foods
revenue_streams.description: Shelf-stable Tanzanian products made at home under Cottage Food Law.
revenue_streams.notes: Legal from home, scalable, low overhead.

revenue_streams.name: Bottled Drinks
revenue_streams.description: Cultural drinks bottled and sold.
revenue_streams.notes: Great for events, markets, and add-ons to catering.

revenue_streams.name: Delivery via Apps
revenue_streams.description: Sell hot meals through delivery platforms (from commercial kitchen).
revenue_streams.notes: Requires consistent kitchen access and menu.

revenue_streams.name: Weekly Family Trays
revenue_streams.description: Large trays for families and gatherings.
revenue_streams.notes: Perfect for weekends and holidays.

revenue_streams.name: Holiday Catering Specials
revenue_streams.description: Special menus for major holidays and celebrations.
revenue_streams.notes: High demand, high revenue windows.

revenue_streams.name: Food Content Creation
revenue_streams.description: Create videos, recipes, and content for brands or your own channels.
revenue_streams.notes: Build long-term brand and passive income potential.

revenue_streams.name: Sauces and Marinades
revenue_streams.description: Bottle and sell Tanzanian sauces.
revenue_streams.notes: Great upsell for catering and meal prep customers.

revenue_streams.name: Subscription Food Boxes
revenue_streams.description: Curated Tanzanian food boxes.
products: Taste of Tanzania Box: mandazi mix, pilau spice, chapati flour, tea blend
revenue_streams.notes: Recurring subscription potential.

revenue_streams.name: Pop-up Restaurant Nights
revenue_streams.description: Temporary restaurant experiences in rented spaces.
revenue_streams.notes: Great for hype, content, and testing full restaurant concept.

revenue_streams.name: Wedding Food Packages
revenue_streams.description: Full wedding catering with Tanzanian menu.
revenue_streams.notes: High-ticket, requires strong planning and presentation.

revenue_streams.name: Corporate Snack Boxes
revenue_streams.description: Tanzanian snack boxes for offices.
revenue_streams.notes: Pairs well with corporate catering relationships.

revenue_streams.name: Frozen Meals
revenue_streams.description: Pre-cooked Tanzanian meals sold frozen.
revenue_streams.notes: Convenience product for repeat customers.

revenue_streams.name: Food Truck Partnerships
revenue_streams.description: Partner with existing food trucks to sell Tanzanian dishes.
revenue_streams.model: You cook, they sell, split profits.
revenue_streams.notes: Lower overhead than owning a truck.

revenue_streams.name: Wholesale to African Stores
revenue_streams.description: Sell packaged goods to local African and international markets.
revenue_streams.notes: Build recurring wholesale relationships.

channels: Flyers at African stores and churches
Partnerships with event planners and venues
marketing_plan.brand_positioning: Authentic Tanzanian food in Atlanta — bold flavors, cultural experience, and reliable catering.
key_messages: Perfect for events, offices, and families.
Cooked in a licensed commercial kitchen.
Options for catering, meal prep, and packaged foods.

next_steps: Choose and sign up with a commercial kitchen (PREP, Atlanta Shared Kitchen, or Leaven).
Finalize core catering menu and pricing.
Set up LLC and sales tax registration.
Design labels for cottage foods (mandazi, spice blends, etc.).
Launch Instagram and Google Business Profile.
Start with one main revenue stream (catering + meal prep) and add others over time.
